title: SessionMetadata
description:
Persisted session metadata — the PRD-09 §2.2 "session state
serialization" shape, plus enough bookkeeping for LRU eviction.

C53 (#406) — `#[cfg_attr(ts-export, ...)]` added so `list_persisted_sessions`
can return this typed shape over IPC (previously only used internally,
with zero production callers).

buffer_size_bytes.description: Ring buffer capacity at save time (bytes).

is_active.description:
True if the PTY is currently alive. Persisted so restart can
skip re-spawning detached sessions.

last_accessed_at.description: Unix seconds of the last read/write/resize.

shell.description: Absolute path of the spawned shell.

working_dir.description: CWD the shell was spawned in.
